## 变更说明 / What changed

<!-- 这个 PR 做了什么、为什么 / What this PR does and why -->

## 变更类型 / Type

- [ ] feat 新功能 / new feature
- [ ] fix 修复 / bug fix
- [ ] docs 文档 / documentation
- [ ] refactor / test / chore

## 检查清单 / Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` 通过 / passes
- [ ] `cd src-tauri && cargo test` 通过 / passes
- [ ] 提交信息遵循 Conventional Commits / commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] UI 字符串已进 i18n 语言文件（不硬编码）/ UI strings go through i18n files (no hardcoded text)
- [ ] 未引入真实 Token / 敏感信息 / no real tokens or secrets introduced
